title: tecap: 3' terminal exon capture diagnostics for long-read scRNA-seq
description: tecap classifies long-read alignments by where their 3' end lands relative to the terminal exon, its UTR, and a polyA site atlas. It decomposes capture failures into nine mechanism buckets and measures reference base composition downstream of each cleavage site to distinguish classic A-tract internal priming from moderate-A priming characteristic of saturating-local-concentration oligo-dT chemistries (10x GEM droplets, BD Rhapsody capture beads).

creators.name: Picelli, Simone
